content:
Introduction

Most traders start with a plan. Few actually succeed.

The problem isn't lack of effort. It's lack of clarity.

When you're trading, you need to know:

• What return do I need per trade to reach my goal?

• What happens if I hit a losing streak?

• Am I on track or falling behind?

Most people use spreadsheets for this. But spreadsheets are messy, error-prone, and hard to share.

That's why we're building Banley.

What is Banley?

Banley is a Progressive Web Application (PWA) that helps traders visualize their compounding journey, understand risk, and track progress.

It's a simple tool with a clear purpose: show traders exactly what they need to do to reach their goals.

What You Can Expect

Strategy Planning

• Two strategy types: Rollover (compounding) and Portfolio Growth (fixed amount)

• Input your capital, target percentage, number of trades, and exchange fees

• Get a full trade-by-trade projection

Risk Awareness

• See what happens after 3, 5, or 7 losses in a row

• Clear risk level indicators (Low → Aggressive)

• Suggestions for safer alternatives

Progress Tracking

• Mark trades as completed

• Enter your actual balance and see updated projections

• Know if you're ahead or behind schedule

Export & Sharing

• Export to Excel with full trade tables

• Generate shareable images for social media

• Connect with our WhatsApp community for support and learning

Privacy-First

• All data stored locally in your browser

• No server, no sign-up, no data collection

The Team Behind Banley

Banley is being built by Kudagon – a team passionate about building real-world tools that people actually use.

We're a small, focused team working remotely. Everyone contributes. Everyone learns. Everyone builds.

Why Banley Matters

Trading is hard. Most people lose money because they don't plan, don't understand risk, and don't track their progress.

Banley changes that. It gives traders a clear path, honest risk warnings, and a community to learn from.

It's not a get-rich-quick tool. It's a get-smarter-over-time tool.

Follow the Journey

We're currently in development and will be sharing updates as we build. Follow along to see Banley come to life.

Banley – Grow with confidence.
